task: graph signal processing and graph neural network analysis
input: graph signals (data values on nodes of a graph)
output: characterization of GNN representation space (permutation equivariance, stability, scalability, transferability)
backbone: graph convolutional filters (including edge-varying and ARMA filters)
key_idea: leverage graph signal processing to show that graph convolutional filters endow GNNs with permutation equivariance and stability to topology changes
